Off Calendar Nov-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Paul Breucop, Esq. and Andrew Dimitriou, Esq. of Dimitriou & Associates, Tel. 415.434.1144, for plaintiff and moving party;
Hien D. Doan, Esq. of the Law Offices of Hien D. Doan, Tel. 510.839.8808, for defendant and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF TIAN SHAN TRADING (USA), INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is Granted as to the seventh cause of action against Cellular Gopher, and denied as to the remaining causes of action against Cellular Gopher and Mr. Yum. Tian Shan Trading (USA), Inc. has not met its initial burden of proof against Mr. Yum as to either cause of action. For the first cause of action, Cellular Gopher has demonstrated a triable issue of fact whether it rejected the goods. For the seventh cause of action, the failure of Cellular Gopher to update its address with the Secretary of State does not create a triable issue of fact. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976
